metadata.name: urdf_semantic_capability_rules
metadata.description: Semantic capability extraction rules for heterogeneous robots using URDF-derived structure, names, joints, sensors, transmissions, controllers, geometry, and metadata.

morphology_rules.description: Humanoid with torso, head, arms, and legs
Service robot with mobile base and interaction sensors
Cleaning robot with brush, vacuum, or sprayer tooling

navigation_rules.description: Mobile platform can perform basic navigation

interaction_rules.description: Can press buttons with arm or end effector
Door opening with mobile manipulation and grasping

communication_rules.description: Remote operation through cameras or telemetry sensors

environment_rules.description: Space environment only when explicitly named

autonomy_rules.description: Shared autonomy for human interaction and manipulation

power_rules.description: Likely tethered ROV when underwater and remote
Hybrid power candidate for large mobile manipulators

quantitative_rules.description: Estimate manipulator reach from arm chain link lengths
Extract payload from metadata or payload link mass
Estimate maximum speed from controller limits or wheel radius and joint velocity
Estimate turning radius for Ackermann bases
Extract dimensions and mass from inertial and geometry data

constraint_rules.description: No manipulator means manipulation capabilities are unavailable
Arm without end effector cannot reliably grasp
Manipulator reach is limited or unknown
